PyCon 2025

Annual Python conference bringing together developers from around the world.

Register Now

About PyCon 2025

PyCon 2025 is the premier annual conference for the Python community. Join thousands of developers, data scientists, and Python enthusiasts from around the globe for three days of inspiring talks, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities.

Whether you're a beginner just starting your Python journey or an experienced developer, PyCon 2025 offers something for everyone. Learn from industry experts, discover cutting-edge tools and frameworks, and connect with fellow Python enthusiasts.

Schedule Highlights

Day 1: Keynotes & Workshops

Date: May 15, 2025

Opening keynotes from industry leaders and hands-on workshops covering Python fundamentals and advanced topics.

Day 2: Technical Talks

Date: May 16, 2025

Deep-dive technical presentations on web development, data science, machine learning, and more.

Day 3: Sprints & Networking

Date: May 17, 2025

Open-source sprints, lightning talks, and evening networking reception.

Venue Information

📍 Location

Convention Center

123 Tech Boulevard

San Francisco, CA 94105

United States

🚀 Getting There

Public Transportation: BART and Muni accessible

Parking: On-site parking available

Accessibility: Fully wheelchair accessible

Accommodations: Hotel partnerships available
